title: MoreItems(Fabric)
description: This mod adds a lot of items(tools, blocks, etc.) that vanilla doesn't have!
body:
这个模组添加了铜制工具和盔甲，用紫水晶制作的工具，甚至基岩矿石...它们似乎有点用了呢..
*注：这个模组还在早期阶段，东西不多。


This mod adds copper tools and armor, tools crafted from amethyst, and even bedrock ore...they seem to work a bit..
*Note: This mod is still in its early stages, not much stuff.
